test_agent_runner.notes: Core non-streamed runner, nested tools, resume paths, and default-runner behavior are exercised.

test_agent_runner_streamed.notes: Live streamed runs, event ordering, and completion state are exercised.

test_agent_runner_sync.notes: Tokio bridging and runtime rejection are covered.

test_max_turns.notes: Max-turn termination and handler behavior are covered in crate tests.

test_openai_conversations_session.notes: Session state load/save, clear behavior, remote bootstrap, and runner continuity are covered.

memory/test_openai_responses_compaction_.notes: Candidate selection, sanitization, threshold-aware compaction, previous-response-id mode, and runner-triggered compaction are covered.

test_openai_responses.notes: Responses payload shaping, output conversion, conversation tracking, websocket framing, and response parsing are covered.

test_openai_chatcompletions.notes: Chat Completions payload shaping, tool choice defaults, logprobs, and response parsing are covered.

test_responses_websocket_session.notes: Responses websocket URL building, headers, query handling, and request framing are covered.

mcp/test_runner_calls_mcp.notes: Non-streamed and streamed MCP tool execution through the runner are covered.

mcp/test_mcp_server_manager.notes: Connect, reconnect, deduplicated failures, active tool listing, and cleanup state are covered.

mcp/test_mcp_resources.notes: Connection-gated resource listing, template listing, and resource reads are covered.

realtime/test_runner.notes: Session creation, run-config model settings, and live session commands are covered.

realtime/test_session.notes: Live event streaming, lifecycle transitions, model-setting state, playback state, interrupts, and shutdown are covered.

realtime/test_openai_realtime.notes: Websocket and SIP model behavior, event-type normalization, and session updates are covered.

realtime/test_audio_formats_unit.notes: Realtime audio-format normalization covers known and custom format values.

realtime/test_playback_tracker.notes: Playback sample accumulation, derived duration, and reset behavior are covered.

realtime/test_playback_tracker_manual_un.notes: Manual playback tracker state transitions are covered alongside the core tracker unit tests.

voice/test_pipeline.notes: Live streamed audio results, transcript events, session lifecycle events, and streamed audio input are covered.

voice/test_workflow.notes: Single-agent workflow state, streamed core-runner output, and transcript extraction are covered.

extensions/test_tool_output_trimmer.notes: Old tool outputs are trimmed while recent turns remain intact.

test_visualization.notes: DOT graph generation for tools and handoffs is covered.

js/agents-core/run.notes: JS core run behavior maps to the shared Rust runner.

js/agents-core/run.stream.notes: JS streamed-run behavior maps to the shared Rust runner.

js/agents-core/mcp.notes: JS MCP server, filter, and runner integration behavior maps to the Rust MCP runtime.

js/agents-openai/openaiConversationsSess.notes: Conversation-backed session bootstrap and continuity are covered.

js/agents-openai/openaiResponsesCompacti.notes: Compaction sessions and threshold-aware previous-response behavior are covered.

js/agents-openai/openaiResponsesModel.notes: Responses model request/response shaping and continuity are covered.

js/agents-openai/responsesWebSocketSessi.notes: Responses websocket session shaping and framing are covered.

js/agents-realtime/realtimeSession.notes: JS realtime session behavior maps to the Rust realtime session runtime.

js/agents-realtime/openaiRealtimeWebsock.notes: Realtime websocket session updates and event normalization are covered.

js/agents-realtime/openaiRealtimeSip.notes: Realtime SIP model behavior maps to the Rust realtime transport model.

js/agents-extensions/CloudflareRealtimeT.notes: Cloudflare Workers websocket-upgrade request shaping and accept flow are covered.

js/agents-extensions/TwilioRealtimeTrans.notes: Twilio media-stream normalization, interruption timing, and outbound mark generation are covered.

test_call_model_input_filter.notes: Streamed and non-streamed `call_model_input_filter` rewrites plus invalid-return failures are covered.

test_call_model_input_filter_unit.notes: Core unit coverage exercises sync/async filter rewrites and invalid-return rejection.

test_session.notes: Rust covers session shaping, limits, and duplicate JSON provenance except for the duplicate empty JSON object `session_input_callback` provenance edge: full Python-style object-identity parity is not safely achievable under the current Rust by-value callback API without an in-band marker or public API change.

test_session_limit.notes: Session limit helpers and MemorySession default-limit behavior are covered.

test_session_exceptions.notes: Session-owned persistence rejects conflicting explicit conversation-tracking settings.

test_openai_chatcompletions_stream.notes: Chat Completions streaming delta ordering and final assembly are covered.

test_server_conversation_tracker.notes: Rust covers sent-state rewind and filtered delta replay except when `call_model_input_filter` drops/reorders siblings and returns multiple fresh replacement items: the current callback API returns only `ModelInputData`, so exact source mapping is not safely recoverable without a provenance-aware API channel.

mcp/test_tool_filtering.notes: Static/callable tool filters, metadata resolution, and approval mapping are covered.

mcp/test_server_errors.notes: Unknown, duplicate, and failing MCP tool paths fail clearly through the shared runner.

mcp/test_mcp_approval.notes: `requires_approval` mapping to approval-gated MCP runtime tools is covered.

mcp/test_mcp_auth_params.notes: SSE and streamable-HTTP auth/configuration handling are covered.

mcp/test_streamable_http_client_factory.notes: Streamable-HTTP client-factory hooks influence the real transport client and are covered.

mcp/test_streamable_http_session_id.notes: Streamable-HTTP session-id allocation, pinning, and reset semantics are covered.

realtime/test_session_payload_and_format.notes: GA-style session payload normalization, transcription rejection, and audio-format extraction are covered.

realtime/test_openai_realtime_sip_model.notes: SIP realtime connect/send/update/disconnect requirements and call-id validation are covered.

voice/test_input.notes: Buffered and streamed voice input normalization into runtime transport formats is covered.

voice/test_openai_stt.notes: OpenAI STT handshake, completion, timeout, and error semantics are covered.

voice/test_openai_tts.notes: OpenAI TTS default/custom voice settings and runtime synthesis behavior are covered.
